name: codex-with-cc
description: A Codex plugin for delegating Codex child-agent work to Claude Code CLI with workflow artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plugin for the Claude Code delegation workflow.
interface.longDescription: Routes Codex main thread planning into staged Codex child-agent execution that is handed off to Claude Code CLI with workflow/task/run artifacts. The repository is self-indexed for Codex plugin installation through its bundled .agents/plugins/marketplace.json manifest.
defaultPrompt: Use the codex-with-cc workflow to delegate child-agent implementation through Claude Code CLI.
Review this repository and explain how Codex main thread planning flows into workflow/task/run Claude Code CLI execution.
Add shaoqing404/codex_with_cc_plus as a Codex plugin marketplace, then install codex-with-cc@codex-with-cc-plus for user scope.
